name: minix
description: Mini X — Twitter-like HLD learning project

scripts.dev:write-1: cd backend && INSTANCE_ID=write-1 PORT=3001 npm run dev
scripts.dev:write-2: cd backend && INSTANCE_ID=write-2 PORT=3002 npm run dev
scripts.dev:read-1: cd read-service && INSTANCE_ID=read-1 PORT=4001 python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4001
scripts.dev:read-2: cd read-service && INSTANCE_ID=read-2 PORT=4002 python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4002
scripts.setup: cd backend && npm install && npm run db:push && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../read-service && pip3 install -r requirements.txt
